meta.description: Nagging pain holding back your training? Trampis PT in Seneca helps active adults keep lifting, WODing, and training hard — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

offer.headline: $97 Comprehensive Evaluation
offer.detail: A 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy — normally $250.

index.title: Trampis PT — Train Hard, Stay Pain-Free | Seneca, SC
index.description: Nagging pain holding back your training? Trampis PT in Seneca helps active adults keep lifting, WODing, and training hard — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

blocks.eyebrow: Seneca, SC · For lifters, CrossFitters & gym regulars
blocks.headline: Keep training hard — without the nagging pain holding you back
blocks.subhead: You don't have to stop lifting, scale every WOD, or wait it out on the couch. We help you train intelligently around an injury and come back stronger.

blocks.headline: Is a nagging injury getting in the way of your goals?
blocks.body: You love training — and you're tired of one stubborn issue dictating what you can and can't do. If this sounds like you, you're in the right place:
items: That shoulder, knee, or back lights up every time you load it heavy
You're scaling lifts and skipping movements you used to crush
Rest days help — until the pain comes right back under the bar
You're worried that pushing through will turn a tweak into a real injury

blocks.headline: You don't have to choose between training and healing.
blocks.body: There's a smarter way to work around an injury — and we'll show you exactly how.

blocks.headline: What it really costs to just push through

items.title: A tweak becomes a real injury
items.body: Ignoring the warning signs and grinding through heavy sessions is how a minor nag turns into months on the sidelines.

items.title: The same flare-up, on repeat
items.body: You back off, it calms down, you load it again, it flares. The cycle stalls your progress and chips away at your confidence.

items.title: Strength and momentum slipping
items.body: Every scaled session and missed PR adds up. The longer it lingers, the more ground you give back in the gym.

blocks.headline: Why Trampis PT is different
blocks.intro: We don't tell active people to rest and stop. We find why your movement is breaking down and build a plan that keeps you training while we fix it.

items.title: Full movement assessment
items.body: A 90-minute, head-to-toe evaluation that finds the real reason your squat, press, or pull is causing pain — not just where it hurts.

items.title: A plan that keeps you training
items.body: We tailor your loading to your goals so you keep building strength and movement quality while the injury settles down.

items.title: Built so it doesn't return
items.body: We rebuild the strength and mechanics under heavy load so you can train hard for the long haul — not just this week.

blocks.headline: Ready to train without holding back?
blocks.body: Your $97 eval includes a full 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Claim your $97 evaluation
steps.body: Book your 90-minute assessment online in under a minute. No referral needed.

steps.title: Get a real diagnosis & game plan
steps.body: We find the root cause behind the pain and map out how you'll keep training while we fix it.

steps.title: Get back to lifting at full effort
steps.body: Execute the plan with a coach in your corner and return stronger — chasing PRs without fear.

blocks.headline: Seneca athletes who kept training and got stronger

items.name: Ean V
items.quote: This guy rocks I love him.

items.quote: Trampis helped me start lifting better immediately!

blocks.headline: Your next PR starts with one decision.
blocks.body: Spots for the $97 evaluation are limited each week. Claim yours before they're gone.

blocks.headline: Claim your $97 evaluation
blocks.intro: Fill out the form and we'll be in touch to lock in your 90-minute assessment.
